description_long: This kindergarten is a single-story, flat-roofed building with a modern, rectangular layout, surrounded by a paved area and a few trees. The main entrance is marked by a covered walkway and large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure features multiple sections, likely classrooms and activity rooms, arranged around a central courtyard or open space. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional design. There are no visible playground structures or decorative elements on the windows. The site is bordered by low walls and open areas, with a driveway or drop-off zone adjacent to the entrance.
description: A modern, flat-roofed kindergarten with large windows, a central courtyard, and minimal exterior decoration, surrounded by paved areas and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a row of trees to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's length, three trees at the rear, and a covered entrance area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear view of the courtyard, trees on the right, and minimal window detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back entrance, two trees in front, and the open paved area.
